what_it_does: This file is a YAML-frontmatter metadata record for a channel attachment that links attachment id att-1800224e to a board item in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
The target is a board:// URI pointing to item-7abbe24d.
An ISO-8601 added timestamp is recorded.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
References an external board item via a board:// URI scheme.
concerns: No body or payload content is present.
The referenced board item is not described in this file.
No author or provenance beyond the timestamp is given.
notes: A metadata stub that records the attachment att-1800224e as belonging to board item item-7abbe24d in the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content or artifact does this attachment represent?
What is the nature of board item item-7abbe24d?
Who or what process added this attachment?
intention_signals: It appears designed to create a durable, timestamped association between a channel attachment and a specific board item for retrieval or audit.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI scheme to reference a board item from a channel attachment record.
contribution: Provides a persistent, timestamped attachment-to-board-item reference for the dragnet-development channel memory ledger.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a YAML-frontmatter channel attachment metadata record of type board_items that links attachment att-1800224e to board item item-7abbe24d and records its addition time.
intention_for_embedding: It was created to persist the association between a channel attachment and a board item for later retrieval or audit.
